name: Fabric Ontology Lab
postCreateCommand: sudo bash -lc 'if ! command -v az >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ "$(az version --query "azure-cli" -o tsv 2>/dev/null)" != "2.84.0" ]; then curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | bash; fi' && pip install uv && pip install -r requirements.txt && cp .env.example .env
postStartCommand: echo '✅ Ready! Run: azd auth login && azd up to deploy Azure resources, then: python scripts/admin_prepare_docs_data_demo.py'
